data.body: Done. Extracted the inspector contract-view cluster to editor_contracts.py (147 LOC, cohesive ≥100), re-exported from editor (stable surface). editor.py 760→631 LOC. Note: editor.py was NOT allowlisted (review conflated it with lint_refs), so no allowlist/architecture.md row to remove. module-size gate green (executor.py trimmed to 800 after b642). 293 workflow + 340 broad tests green, lint clean.
